meanings.definition: give up one's career just as one becomes very successful
examples: The financial consultant topped out at age 40 because he was burned out

meanings.definition: provide with a top or finish the top (of a structure)
examples: the towers were topped with conical roofs

meanings.definition: to reach the highest point; attain maximum intensity, activity
examples: That wild, speculative spirit peaked in 1929
Bids for the painting topped out at $50 million
